body.title: Remove claim from sprint-ticket skill; use queue_next in_progress mark
body.result: Removed claim language from sprint-ticket SKILL.md; Step 2 uses dispatch-is-assignment model
body.description:
With the ADC queue device live, /sprint-ticket no longer needs a claim step. Update /sprint-ticket SKILL.md Step 2: instead of `cc_queue.py claim <id>`, the in_progress marking now happens atomically inside queue_next() when the ticket is surfaced. For tickets started via `/sprint T-xxx` (direct ID, not queue_next), document that the sprint-ticket step skips claim and the ticket is manually marked in_progress via queue_show → direct status update.

**Affected files:** ~/.claude/skills/sprint-ticket/SKILL.md (Step 2), ~/dev/src/UnseenUniversity/lab/claudecode/cc_skills/sprint-ticket/SKILL.md (mirror)
**Design rules:** no-claiming standing instruction; queue_next is the only path to mark in_progress
**Scope boundary:** sprint-ticket Step 2 only; NOT touch cc_queue.py (claim already removed in T-retire-worker-daemon-sh); NOT touch other skill files
**Test plan:** sprint-ticket SKILL.md Step 2 contains no reference to `cc_queue.py claim`; visual verify the new text is consistent with queue_next atomic behavior
